gt_sql: SELECT T1.name, T1.artist, T1.isPromo FROM cards AS T1 INNER JOIN rulings AS T2 ON T1.uuid = T2.uuid WHERE T1.isPromo = 1 AND T1.artist = (SELECT artist FROM cards WHERE isPromo = 1 GROUP BY artist HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT uuid) = (SELECT MAX(count_uuid) FROM ( SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT uuid) AS count_uuid FROM cards WHERE isPromo = 1 GROUP BY artist ))) LIMIT 1
pred_sql:
SELECT c.name, c.artist, c.isPromo
FROM cards c
JOIN (
    SELECT uuid, COUNT(*) as ruling_count
    FROM rulings
    GROUP BY uuid
    ORDER BY ruling_count DESC
    LIMIT 1
) r ON c.uuid = r.uuid;
question: Name the card and artist with the most ruling information. Also state if the card is a promotional printing.
